subject: feat(search): show 3 suggestions with fade hint for scrollable overflow
body:
Display 3 visible search suggestions in the dropdown instead of 1,
with a bottom fade overlay indicating more results can be scrolled.
Dropdown height is capped at 3.5 items (3 full + partial peek).
Fade uses CSS linear-gradient on web, solid opacity on native.

Tags: ui, search, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: search-ux
Semver: minor
